title: tanacetum sanguineum
intro: Tanacetum sanguineum, also known as Sanguisorba or burnet, is a flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a styptic to stop bleeding and as an anti-inflammatory to reduce swelling. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including aiding in wound healing, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. Tanacetum sanguineum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of conditions.
